title: erythroxylum macrocarpum
intro: Erythroxylum macrocarpum, also known as the small Amazonian coca, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects, due to its high concentration of alkaloids. The health benefits of Erythroxylum macrocarpum include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and provide relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Erythroxylum macrocarpum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and it has been traditionally used in folk medicine in South America.
